assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response configures recurring maintenance windows for Saturdays using 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' in both Terraform and gcloud examples

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The gcloud script includes --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence with 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response configures quarterly freeze exclusions with approximately 15-18 day periods for each quarter

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes an 'annual-audit-november' exclusion covering November 1-30

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and that only auto-upgrades respect these restrictions

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response mentions using 'REGULAR' channel but suggests 'STABLE for more conservative updates', indicating channel selection for upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The gcloud script includes multiple exclusion commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or maintenance freezes
